name: Hawaiian Bread
recipeIngredient: 1/3 cup macadamia nut bits (can use walnuts)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F.
2. Cream together the sugar and margarine until smooth.
3. Add the eggs, one at a time, mixing well after each addition.
4. Stir in the mashed bananas, pineapple mixture, macadamia nuts, and coconut.
5. Gradually add the Bisquick mix, stirring until just combined.
6. Pour the batter into a greased loaf pan.
7. Bake for 55 minutes or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
